# Project Management and RAID Domain

## Goal
Implement features aligned with real project/programme management practice.

## Do
- Model programme-project relationships and ownership correctly.
- Capture RAID records with lifecycle, status, ownership, and due dates.
- Support role-based visibility and update permissions for project context.
- Use terminology consistent with project management users.

## Checks
- Domain entities and workflows map to requirement language.
- Reports and dashboards use meaningful operational metrics.
- Data fields support practical governance and review cadence.
